prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large yellow metal cube
  - obj_1: small red rubber sphere
  - obj_2: large yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_3: small cyan rubber cube
  - obj_4: large cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_5: large yellow metal cube
  - obj_6: large cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: large purple rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_9: small yellow metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0361] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0362] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0369] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0370] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0371] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0372] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D scene and compare distances between pairs of objects for each question.

Let me first identify the approximate positions of each object:
- obj_0 (large yellow metal cube): left area, back
- obj_1 (small red rubber sphere): back area, behind
- obj_2 (large yellow metal cylinder): front center
- obj_3 (small cyan rubber cube): left-center area
- obj_4 (large cyan metal cylinder): right-back area
- obj_5 (large yellow metal cube): center-back area
- obj_6 (large cyan rubber cylinder): right-front area
- obj_7 (large purple rubber sphere): center-front area
- obj_8 (small cyan metal cylinder): left area, front
- obj_9 (small yellow metal sphere): right area

Now let me estimate distances:

obj_1 to obj_8: obj_1 is far back, obj_8 is front-left. These are quite far apart - roughly medium-large distance.

Let me work through each comparison:

[qrr_0361] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_7: obj_2 and obj_7 are both front, close together. obj_1-obj_8 is larger. >
[qrr_0362] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_2-obj_9: obj_2 front, obj_9 right - moderate distance. obj_1-obj_8 seems similar or larger. >
[qrr_0363] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_3-obj_4: obj_3 left-center, obj_4 right-back - moderate-large. obj_1-obj_8 similar. ~=
[qrr_0364] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_3-obj_5: obj_3 and obj_5 are relatively close. obj_1-obj_8 is larger. >
[qrr_0365] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_3-obj_6: obj_3 left, obj_6 right-front - moderate. Similar to obj_1-obj_8. ~=
[qrr_0366] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_3-obj_7: obj_3 left, obj_7 center-front - moderate. obj_1-obj_8 seems similar. ~=
[qrr_0367] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_3-obj_9: obj_3 and obj_9 are moderately close. obj_1-obj_8 larger. >
[qrr_0368] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_5: obj_4 right-back, obj_5 center-back - relatively close. obj_1-obj_8 larger. >
[qrr_0369] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_6: obj_4 back-right, obj_6 front-right - moderate. obj_1-obj_8 similar. ~=
[qrr_0370] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_7: obj_4 back, obj_7 front - large distance. obj_1-obj_8 smaller. <
[qrr_0371] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_4-obj_9: obj_4 and obj_9 relatively close. obj_1-obj_8 larger. >
[qrr_0372] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_5-obj_7: obj_5 back, obj_7 front - large. obj_1-obj_8 smaller. <
[qrr_0373] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_5-obj_9: obj_5 and obj_9 close. obj_1-obj_8 larger. >
[qrr_0374] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_6-obj_7: obj_6 and obj_7 close. obj_1-obj_8 larger. >
[qrr_0375] obj_1-obj_8 vs obj_6-obj_9: obj_6 right-front, obj_9 right - moderate. obj_1-obj_8 similar or larger. >
[qrr_0376] obj_1-obj_9 vs obj_2-obj_3: obj_1 back, obj_9 right - large. obj_2 front, obj_3 left - moderate. obj_1-obj_9 larger. >
[qrr_0377] obj_1-obj_9 vs obj_2-obj_4: obj_2 front, obj_4 back - large. obj_1-obj_9 similar. ~=
[qrr_0378] obj_1-obj_9 vs obj_2-obj_5: obj_2 front, obj_5 back - large. obj_1-obj_9 similar. ~=
[qrr_0379] obj_1-obj_9 vs obj_2-obj_6: obj_2 and obj_6 close. obj_1-obj_9 larger. >
[qrr_0380] obj_1-obj_9 vs obj_2-obj_7: obj_2 and obj_7 close. obj_1-obj_9 larger. >
